mapper.select: SELECT 1 FROM ITEM WHERE ITEM_NO = #{itemNo} FOR UPDATE

SELECT CASE WHEN bidCount <= 1 THEN (SELECT START_PRICE FROM ITEM WHERE ITEM_NO = #{itemNo}) ELSE ( SELECT BID_PRICE FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rn, BID_PRICE FROM ( SELECT BID_PRICE FROM BID WHERE ITEM_NO = #{itemNo} ORDER BY BID_PRICE DESC, BID_TIME ASC ) ) WHERE rn = 2 ) END AS CURRENT_PRICE FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS bidCount FROM BID WHERE ITEM_NO = #{itemNo} )
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_BID_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BID ( BID_NO, ITEM_NO, USER_NO, BID_PRICE, BID_TIME, BID_IP ) VALUES ( #{bidNo}, #{itemNo}, #{userNo}, #{bidPrice}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{bidIp} )
mapper.select: SELECT B.USER_NO AS userNo, M.USER_ID AS userId, B.BID_PRICE AS bidPrice, B.BID_TIME AS bidTime, B.BID_IP AS bidIp, D.BIDDER_NO AS ranking FROM BID B JOIN MEMBER M ON (B.USER_NO = M.USER_NO) JOIN ( SELECT USER_NO, BID_IP, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY MIN(BID_TIME) ASC) AS BIDDER_NO FROM BID WHERE ITEM_NO = #{itemNo} GROUP BY USER_NO, BID_IP ) D ON (B.USER_NO = D.USER_NO AND B.BID_IP = D.BID_IP) WHERE B.ITEM_NO = #{itemNo} ORDER BY B.BID_TIME DESC
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM BID WHERE ITEM_NO = #{itemNo} AND BID_STATUS IS NULL ORDER BY BID_PRICE DESC, BID_TIME ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT B.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY BID_PRICE DESC, BID_TIME ASC) AS RN FROM BID B WHERE ITEM_NO = #{itemNo} ) WHERE RN = 2
mapper.update: MERGE INTO BID B USING ( SELECT BID_NO, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY BID_PRICE DESC, BID_TIME ASC) AS RN FROM BID WHERE ITEM_NO = #{itemNo} ) R ON (B.BID_NO = R.BID_NO) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET B.RANKING = CASE WHEN R.RN = 1 THEN 1 WHEN R.RN = 2 THEN 2 ELSE NULL END
